title: campanula pusilla subsp. jaubertiana
intro: Campanula pusilla subsp. jaubertiana, also known as the dwarf bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Campanula pusilla subsp. jaubertiana include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall respiratory health and well-being.
